title: oldenlandia noctiflora
intro: Oldenlandia noctiflora, also known as Yin Chai Hu, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Asia and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve overall health. The health benefits of Oldenlandia noctiflora include its ability to boost the immune system, treat digestive problems, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which are then used to treat a range of health conditions.
